items.rationale: Visible as a single thin gold-colored chain, typical weight for thin chain necklaces, assumed 22K purity based on traditional yellow gold context.

items.shape_or_design: wider flat linked necklace with detailed design
items.rationale: Wider, heavier design typical of traditional necklaces. Weight is conservatively estimated higher than thin chain but not extremely heavy. 22K purity assumed following common traditional jewellery purity.

items.shape_or_design: round bead-like design with pendant end
items.estimated_material: yellow metal, likely gold with possible gold beads
items.rationale: Design suggests solid or hollow beads, pendants add to weight. Purity assumed 22K as traditional. Uncertainty due to potential bead hollowing or mixed materials.

items.shape_or_design: stacked circular bangles with hollow intricate design
items.rationale: Three stacked bangles, each estimated around 15-18g considering hollow construction. 22K purity assumed as typical for traditional bangles.
Pair of small earrings, each ~2g with 22K purity assumed conservatively.

assumptions: Gold material estimated from yellow metal color seen in image.
Purity assumed likely 22K as traditional Indian jewellery tends to use 22K gold.
Weights conservatively estimated based on typical jewelry sizes and shapes visible.
Gold rate from Goodreturns used: 12435 INR/g for 22K gold as of 23 March 2026.
Making charges and minor deductions subsumed within value range as conservative buffers.
Counts reflect visible distinct items or sets (e.g., 3 bangles stacked, 2 earrings).
Weight estimates consider possible hollowness for bangles and bead construction.

override_applied.reason: Model returned inconsistent totals after retries. Totals were recomputed from item ranges.
